parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ data: { type: 'profile', attributes: { email: $json.customer_email, external_id: String($json.customer_id), properties: { vip_tier: 'VIP_Tier_1', rfm_score: $json.rfm_score, total_orders: $json.total_orders, total_spend: $json.total_spend } } } }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ data: [{ type: 'profile', id: $('Klaviyo: Get or Create Profile').first().json.data.id }] }) }}

parameters.content: # WooCommerce to Klaviyo VIP Automation using RFM Scoring

## Overview
### When an order is marked completed in WooCommerce, this workflow finds your best customers automatically:

1) Triggers on order.updated
2) Continues only if status = "completed"
3) Pulls all completed orders for that customer
4) Calculates RFM score (Recency, Frequency, Monetary)
5) If RFM total ≥ 12 → treats as VIP
6) Creates/updates profile in Klaviyo with VIP properties
7) Adds profile to Klaviyo VIP_Tier_1 list
8) Posts detailed VIP alert in Slack

Node-by-node Purpose
1. WooCommerce Trigger
event: order.updated — Listens for WooCommerce order updates via webhook
2. IF: Order Completed
IF $json.status equals completed — Routes to Get Customer Orders if true, to Not Completed - Stop if false
3. Not Completed - Stop
type: noOp — Terminates workflow for non-completed orders
4. Get Customer Orders
resource: order — Targets WooCommerce orders
operation: getAll — Fetches complete order history
returnAll: true — Ensures full history to avoid skewed RFM calculation
5. Calculate RFM Score
logic: jsCode — Calculates RFM from completed orders only; Recency: <=30 days=5, <=60=4, <=90=3, <=180=2, else 1; Frequency: >=10 orders=5, >=7=4, >=4=3, >=2=2, else 1; Monetary: >=$1000=5, >=$500=4, >=$200=3, >=$100=2, else 1; outputs rfm_score, customer_email, customer_id, customer_name, totals
6. IF: VIP Score
IF $json.rfm_score >= 12 — Routes to Klaviyo flow if true, to Not VIP - Stop if false
7. Not VIP - Stop
type: noOp — Terminates workflow for customers below VIP threshold
8. Klaviyo: Get or Create Profile
method: POST — Creates or updates profile via Klaviyo API
url: https://a.klaviyo.com/api/profile-import/ — Profile import endpoint
body: vip_tier: VIP_Tier_1, rfm_score, total_orders, total_spend — Stores VIP status and RFM data on profile
9. Klaviyo: Add to VIP List
method: POST — Adds profile to list
url: https://a.klaviyo.com/api/lists/YOUR_KLAVIYO_LIST_ID/relationships/profiles — VIP list relationship endpoint
action: Subscribes the profile ID from previous node to VIP segment
10. Slack: New VIP Alert
text: Slack message — Posts trophy alert with name, email, RFM score/15 with R/F/M breakdown, total orders, and lifetime spend in $
